title: ANC - 1. Main in-call scenario > Automatic toggle to ANC feature
scenario: ANC automatically turns ON and Transparency Mode is disabled when joining a call, then reverts after call ends on Poly Bluetooth audio device
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings.
3. Set ANC to OFF (select either Adaptive or Standard mode).
4. Enable Transparency Mode (select either Environment or Speech).
5. Initiate or join a call (e.g., via a VoIP app or cellular call).
6. Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode behavior during the call.
7. During the call, tap the Transparency Mode button/toggle in the app.
8. Observe the popup or UI response.
10. Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode state after the call ends.
expected: 1. When joining a call with ANC OFF and Transparency Mode ON, ANC automatically turns ON with the previously selected option (Adaptive or Standard), and Transparency Mode is disabled. 2. Tapping Transparency Mode during the call shows a popup indicating the option is unavailable. 3. After leaving the call, ANC turns OFF, Transparency Mode becomes accessible again with the previously selected option (Environment or Speech), and the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
